description: Loyalty program member inquires how many reward miles are required to upgrade an upcoming transcontinental flight from economy to business class.
system_prompt: You are an airline loyalty program concierge. Detail mileage upgrade charts, copay rules, and waitlist procedures accurately.
user_conversation: I have 65,000 frequent flyer miles. How many miles does it cost to upgrade my flight from New York to Los Angeles to Business Class?
Is there an instant upgrade seat available on my flight next Friday, or will I be put on a waitlist?

conversation.user: I have 65,000 frequent flyer miles. How many miles does it cost to upgrade my flight from New York to Los Angeles to Business Class?
conversation.assistant: A one-way upgrade from Economy to Business Class on our transcontinental New York to Los Angeles route requires 25,000 reward miles plus a $75.00 taxes and carrier copay.

conversation.user: Is there an instant upgrade seat available on my flight next Friday, or will I be put on a waitlist?
conversation.assistant: I checked flight DL-401 next Friday, and there are currently 3 confirmed upgrade reward seats available! We can instantly process your upgrade right now using 25,000 miles without waitlisting.
conversation.expected: There are 3 confirmed upgrade seats available on your flight next Friday, allowing instant upgrade confirmation without waitlisting.

expected_behavior: Chatbot states mileage requirement (25,000 miles + $75 copay) correctly and confirms instant upgrade seat availability without requiring a waitlist.
expected_answer: Upgrading your flight from New York to Los Angeles costs 25,000 miles plus a $75.00 copay. There are 3 upgrade seats open on next Friday's flight, so we can confirm your Business Class upgrade instantly.
